title: Mana Rythu
description: Cut Middlemen. Empower Farmers. — AI-powered Farmer-to-Buyer Platform

title: Problem
description: Farmers lose 30–40% income due to middlemen, no price transparency, unstable supply

title: Solution
description: Direct farmer-to-buyer marketplace with AI and real-time chat

title: Product Features
description: Marketplace, Real-time Chat, AI Assistant, Price Intelligence

title: Live Working App
description: Real screenshots — all features implemented and functional

title: How It Works
description: 5-step flow: List → View → Chat → AI Pricing → Deal

title: Impact
description: Transparency, faster discovery, price visibility, multilingual AI guidance

title: Market Size
description: 140M+ farm holdings, ₹30T+ agri supply chain, 350M+ rural internet users

title: Tech Stack
description: React, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, OpenAI API, Tailwind CSS

title: Vision
description: Empowering Farmers Through Technology — GitHub + Live app
